name: Mr. Felix The Cat (Jekyll and Hyde AU!)
description:
I’ve currently been hyper fixating on Jekyll and Hyde, as well as cats. So why not combine Jekyll and Hyde with one of the old fandoms I was in? (I do not support the creator of BABTQFTIM)

If you haven’t seen the Jekyll and Hyde musical, I totally recommend it, my favorite song is “Dangerous Game”, I love this play so much, but I do need to learn about the lore some more. So if there are a few inaccuracies, please tell me so I can fix them! I’m not even sure if this is the right setting of the scene here! (I have a concerningly bad memory. Not /j.)

This is for my own enjoyment...but if you know these fandoms (or just wanna use the bot lol) then, congrats, A BOT🔥🔥🔥🔥 but yeah, it’s the scene where he’s at a “gentleman’s club” that he’d been dragged to and met Lucy, in this case it’s Felix and {{user}} 💜

(Also, since Jekyll’s name changes to Edward Hyde, I wasn’t sure what to change Felix’s name to for his alter ego, so for now it remains Felix unless someone has some ideas!)

Intro is pretty short, sorryyyy!
creator: RosieRoseRoses
